projects.raw_text:
FPGA Prototyping using Xilinx IP

Jun 2020 – Jul 2022


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Undergone training in FPGA Architecture and Programming using Verilog HDL with NIELIT. Completed a miniproject "FPGA Prototyping using Xilinix IP". Under the project Xilinx Vivado tool was used to integrate modules like Xilinx counter IP, multiplexer, latch, decoder to implement a digital circuit. The code was dumped in to Arty A7 FPGA board XC7A50T-1CSG324

Design test to identify coupling faults on Bit Lines

Mar 2021 – Apr 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Identified and emulated the adverse effects of coupling between bit lines in a memory array under different PVT conditions. Emulation was done by injecting voltage stress on Word line, varying the precharge arrival time & aggressor cell supply voltage.
(Team Size - 3)

RTL to GDS flow for a multifunctional circuit

Mar 2021 – Apr 2021


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

The project was to understand and analyze different stages of VLSI chip design flow. An RTL
code for a given problem was written and compiled, code coverage report was generated
using Covered. Also generated synthesized netlist file, Power and area report, performed
static timing analysis, logical equivalence checking, Inserted scan-chain in the design for
post silicon verification (DFT)

Design and layout of Complex AOI222 complex gate

Oct 2020 – Dec 2020


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Designed a complex AOI222 gate. The layout was verified for DRC and LVS checks and Post to pre-layout changes were marginal.
The design was made using Cadence virtuoso tool, Simulation were done using Mentor Graphics Eldo. 
(Team Size - 3)

High speed OPAMP design with high CMRR

Oct 2020 – Dec 2020


Associated with Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology, Delhi

Designed a two stage operational amplifier having high slew rate and high common mode rejection ratio using Cadence Virtuoso with gpdk180 library.
(Team Size - 2)

B.Tech Major-FIR filter design using seamless pipelining

Jun 2016 – Jan 2017


Associated with Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology

The central design concept is to build FIR filters to be operated at high frequency by introducing pipelining within the structure, Thus improving the performance.
